summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification over 10 listed pull requests. No shared canonical was selected. Open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/author review, closed PRs are recorded as already closed, and the security-sensitive Mattermost PR is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Useful focused maintainer hardening PR, but draft/maintainer-review state and no merge permission make non-mutating independent classification the conservative plan.
Distinct open maintainer-owned MCP catalog hardening PR; keep it independently for normal review rather than deduping it into the mixed inventory shard.
Already closed; the active hydrated path for the same doctor platform-incompatible-skill problem is #89260, so no action is needed on #89282.
Related MCP test coverage with no closure or merge authority in this job; keep it related for maintainer review.
Large active documentation PR with author/maintainer follow-up still in progress; keep independently instead of closing or merging.
Best surviving active PR for the ANNOUNCE_SKIP family, but merge is blocked by plan-mode/no-merge permissions and maintainer-review requirement.
Active contributor PR with useful code and unresolved review/author follow-up; keep independently for review rather than closing or merging.
Distinct open Copilot bridge hardening PR; keep independently for maintainer review.
Security-sensitive item is out of ProjectClownfish cleanup scope; route only this item to central OpenClaw security handling and keep unrelated items classified.
Already closed and the hydrated merged path for the same message-loop fix is #89109; no further action is valid.
